title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 254.090 - Tax rate on privately owned forest cropland
text:
254.090.  Tax rate on privately owned forest cropland. — Privately owned lands classified as forest croplands under this chapter shall be assessed for general taxation purposes at three dollars per acre, and taxed at the local rates of the county wherein the lands are located.  Lands so classified prior to August 14, 1974, shall be assessed for general taxation purposes at one dollar per acre and taxed at the local rate of the county wherein the lands are located.
(L. 1945 p. 672 § 8, A.L. 1974 H.B. 1210, A.L. 1981 H.B. 308)
